agents.agent_description: Searches legal databases for relevant case laws, statutes, and precedents.
Generates legal documents, contracts, and agreements based on user input.
Summarizes case details and provides insights into legal arguments and possible outcomes.
Ensures legal documents and contracts comply with local and international regulations.
